title: Claude Grows Economic Tentacles: A Single Sentence Can Reveal Which Jobs Are Being Rewritten by AI
excerpt: Anthropic has connected its chatbot Claude to a new data pipeline. At the other end of this pipeline is Anthropic's own "economic index"—a vast database that re
content_html:
Anthropic has connected its chatbot Claude to a new data pipeline. At the other end of this pipeline is Anthropic's own "economic index"—a vast database that records what people are actually doing with AI in the real world. Now, anyone using claude.ai can ask a question in the chatbox like they would ask a colleague, such as "Which professions use AI the most," and the answer will directly come from this index, rather than being made up by the model.

This feature, called the "Anthropic Economic Index Connector," was officially launched on July 23rd. It works with any model—whether you're using any version of Claude, in any conversation, you can activate it at any time, and no plugins or extensions are required. Open the connector menu on the left side of claude.ai, find "Anthropic Economic Index" in the directory, and turn it on. It takes about a minute for this "eye" to open.

This index itself serves as a benchmark for measuring how AI is actually used in the real economy. In the past, these numbers mainly served researchers, journalists, and policymakers; now, Anthropic clearly wants to put it in the hands of ordinary people—if you have even the slightest curiosity about whether "AI will take my department's livelihood," you can now explore the data yourself.

The usage is natural. You can start with broad questions, such as "What does this index say about my industry," and then dig deeper along the clues; or you can directly ask specific scenarios: What do people in Colorado use Claude for the most? What tasks do teachers usually ask AI to help with? What changes have occurred in the types of tasks automated by AI over the past year? Claude will provide answers and also show you the original data supporting those answers.

It's important to note that this mirror only reflects Claude's own usage patterns, not the entire labor market. Anthropic specifically reminded users during the release that the index reflects how people using Claude work, not the total picture of all AI tools. Therefore, before drawing conclusions from the data, Claude will guide you to review the source data and its limitations—what samples are not covered, and what conclusions should be questioned.

sentences.zh: 打开claude.ai左侧的连接器菜单，在目录中找到“Anthropic Economic Index”，并将其打开。

sentences.en: It takes about a minute for this "eye" to open.
sentences.zh: 这只“眼睛”大约需要一分钟才能睁开。

sentences.zh: 您可以从广泛的问题开始，例如“该指数对我的行业有何评价”，然后沿着线索进行更深入的挖掘；或者你可以直接询问具体场景：科罗拉多州的人们最常使用Claude做什么？

sentences.en: What tasks do teachers usually ask AI to help with?
sentences.zh: 老师通常要求人工智能帮助完成哪些任务？

sentences.en: What changes have occurred in the types of tasks automated by AI over the past year?
sentences.zh: 过去一年里，人工智能自动化的任务类型发生了哪些变化？

sentences.en: Claude will provide answers and also show you the original data supporting those answers.
sentences.zh: 克劳德将提供答案，并向您展示支持这些答案的原始数据。

sentences.en: It's important to note that this mirror only reflects Claude's own usage patterns, not the entire labor market.
sentences.zh: 需要注意的是，这面镜子只反映了克劳德自己的使用模式，而不是整个劳动力市场。

sentences.en: Anthropic specifically reminded users during the release that the index reflects how people using Claude work, not the total picture of all AI tools.
sentences.zh: Anthropic在发布时特别提醒用户，该指数反映的是人们使用Claude的工作方式，而不是所有AI工具的全貌。

sentences.en: Therefore, before drawing conclusions from the data, Claude will guide you to review the source data and its limitations—what samples are not covered, and what conclusions should be questioned.
sentences.zh: 因此，在从数据中得出结论之前，克劳德会引导你回顾一下源数据及其局限性——哪些样本没有被覆盖，哪些结论值得质疑。

content_html_zh:
Anthropic 已将其聊天机器人 Claude 连接到新的数据管道。 这条管道的另一端是 Anthropic 自己的“经济指数”——一个庞大的数据库，记录了人们在现实世界中实际使用人工智能所做的事情。 现在，任何使用claude.ai的人都可以像问同事一样在聊天框中提出问题，比如“哪些职业使用AI最多”，答案将直接来自这个索引，而不是由模型组成。

这一功能被称为“人类经济指数连接器”，于 7 月 23 日正式推出。 它适用于任何模型 - 无论您使用任何版本的 Claude，在任何对话中，您都可以随时激活它，并且不需要任何插件或扩展。 打开claude.ai左侧的连接器菜单，在目录中找到“Anthropic Economic Index”，并将其打开。 这只“眼睛”大约需要一分钟才能睁开。

该指数本身就是衡量人工智能在实体经济中实际应用情况的基准。 过去，这些数字主要服务于研究人员、记者和政策制定者；现在，Anthropic 显然想把它放到普通人的手中——如果你对“人工智能是否会夺走我部门的生计”有哪怕一丝好奇，你现在可以自己探索数据。

用法很自然。 您可以从广泛的问题开始，例如“该指数对我的行业有何评价”，然后沿着线索进行更深入的挖掘；或者你可以直接询问具体场景：科罗拉多州的人们最常使用Claude做什么？ 老师通常要求人工智能帮助完成哪些任务？ 过去一年里，人工智能自动化的任务类型发生了哪些变化？ 克劳德将提供答案，并向您展示支持这些答案的原始数据。

需要注意的是，这面镜子只反映了克劳德自己的使用模式，而不是整个劳动力市场。 Anthropic在发布时特别提醒用户，该指数反映的是人们使用Claude的工作方式，而不是所有AI工具的全貌。 因此，在从数据中得出结论之前，克劳德会引导你回顾一下源数据及其局限性——哪些样本没有被覆盖，哪些结论值得质疑。
